rulings.Case Title: THE VERLIS BROWN SMITH LIVING TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22,2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Interrogatories Production Of Documents And For Attorneys Fees Costs And Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2007. Plaintiff Vincent Hasyhurst's Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Interrogatories, Production Of Documents is denied. The motion was filed after the 45 day period to file a motion to compel had expired. [C.C.P. Sections 2030.300(c) and 2031.31(c))] Plaintiff's motion was made without substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff and his counsel in the amount of $700, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (612/EAH)
